reviews.text: Lyndsey was absolutely a delight to work with! She was patient and kind and obviously knew what she was doing! We took some couples photos with Lyndsey and the whole time she was hyping us up and making us feel comfortable! And the photos turned out absolutely AMAZING! We love them so much! We can’t wait to work with her again in the future! Whatever type of photos you are looking for she’s definitely got you! Definitely book her for your next couples, family, or boudoir shoot!

Lyndsey is an incredible photographer, expert herder of wiley wedding subjects, and wonderful person. She photographed our wedding party. We only really wanted a select few shots including couples shots, family photos ,and some candid shots from the event. I was so impressed by Lyndsey's ability to wrangle a large group of folks and manage posing/smiles/environment to get a great shot.  I was amazed at how quickly we had finished the big family photos and the quality of how the shots came out shows how seemingly effortlessly she can capture the moment. She easily brings out laughter and joy from everyone she is taking shots with. Lyndsey got my partner and I laughing and having fun through our shoot, even with pre-party jitters. Our candids were spectacular as well and she caught all the most special moments. Her preview photos came super fast, which is amazing when you are SO excited to get your photos. Lyndsey is amazing and I can't recommend her enough.

As a vendor, we have worked with Lyndsey doing weddings and boudoir. Her communication, timeliness, organized being makes our job performance with ease. She’s great at what she does and it reflects in the end product. She’s also great at sharing work and keeping vendors in the loop which can be hard for some photographers and us as artists.

All of this leads to my personal relationship with Lyndsey. She was so amazing to work with professionally I knew I needed to use her in my personal life. She has done multiple of my family photos including our pregnancy announcement and our newly family of four a year later. She is great with location, delivery, follow up, albums, the works! I cannot recommend her enough. She also did photos of my pups before we had to put our senior pup down to cross the rainbow bridge. I don’t think she will understand how much all these moments in times she’s captured mean to my family. You honestly can’t meet a more beautiful human being. You won’t be disappointed!

As a wedding planner, I've worked with Lyndsey on many different occasions. She's reliably kind, timely, professional, funny, and personable. Her photos always far exceed my expectations. She really cares about taking care of the planet and advocating for social justice, and this is reflected in every area of her business. I will always recommend her to any of my couples, without reservation!

From someone who does not feel very photogenic, Lyndsey blew me away! She gave us pointers of how to pose without it feeling directed or awkward. Even my boyfriend, who hates taking pictures, had fun! The photo shoot was quick, and resulted in so many great shots and memories to last a lifetime. Thank you Lyndsey for making our first photo shoot amazing 💜
